name: Directrent - Find Apartments
subtitle: Rent Direct, Save More
description:
Find and rent apartments directly from Lagos landlords — no agent fees, no middlemen. Save up to ₦100,000 on every rental.

🏠 BROWSE VERIFIED PROPERTIES
Thousands of verified apartments across Lagos — Yaba, Lekki, Ikeja, Surulere, Ajah, and more.

💰 ZERO AGENT FEES
Pay landlords directly. Our platform fee is just 2-3% — saving you up to ₦100,000 on typical Lagos rentals.

🔒 SAFE & SECURE
• BVN/NIN verified landlords and tenants
• Secure Paystack escrow protects your deposit
• Two-way ratings and reviews
• Digital lease agreements

💬 DIRECT COMMUNICATION
Message landlords directly — no middlemen, no delays.

📱 BUILT FOR LAGOS
• Nigerian phone authentication
• Naira (₦) pricing throughout
• Lagos-specific property search
• Offline property browsing
